review.summary: 7 scenes spanning 0–30s; 3 scene types (text_card, diagram, animation); 1 Mermaid diagram asset; all Remotion-native except diagram_gen.

scenes.description: Opening hero title: 'Photosynthesis in 30 Seconds' with leaf icon pulse on dark slate background. Subtitle fades in: 'Sunlight In, Life Out'. Spring bounce entrance per playbook.
scenes.framing: full-screen centered title stack, leaf icon above headline
scenes.movement: title scale-up bounce (0.8→1.05→1.0); subtitle fade-up 0.4s after title lands; leaf icon gentle pulse loop
scenes.overlay_notes: Remotion cut type: hero_title. text='Photosynthesis in 30 Seconds', subtitle='Sunlight In, Life Out'. Accent #7C3AED, bg #0F172A.
scenes.shot_intent: Stop-scroll hook — promise a complete mental model in one watch.
scenes.information_role: Viewer knows topic and duration contract.

scenes.description: Diagram Reveal: stylized chloroplast cross-section. Sun rays enter from upper-left; chlorophyll discs glow #7C3AED as light hits. Progressive build — outer membrane first, then thylakoid stacks, then light arrows.
scenes.framing: full-screen diagram centered, sun icon offset upper-left
scenes.movement: progressive reveal left-to-right; glow pulse on chlorophyll when narrator says 'chlorophyll'
scenes.overlay_notes: Lower-third key term chip: 'Chloroplast' at 6s. Neon outlines on #0F172A per playbook diagram_style.
scenes.shot_intent: Zoom into the cellular engine where light is captured.
scenes.information_role: Viewer sees where photosynthesis happens inside the leaf.

required_assets.description: Mermaid flowchart LR: Sunlight → Chlorophyll (in Chloroplast) → Light Energy. Neon purple/teal palette on dark slate. Rounded rectangles, glowing edges.

scenes.description: Kinetic equation beat 1: H₂O molecule icon at center splits into H + O fragments; O₂ pair forms and floats upward with cyan (#06B6D4) glow trail. Matches 'light splits water apart'.
scenes.framing: centered molecule, O₂ exits upward into upper third
scenes.movement: H2O shake → crack → split animation; O2 molecules rise with spring overshoot
scenes.overlay_notes: Icon labels: H₂O (before split), O₂ (after). Remotion text_card chips for molecule names.
scenes.shot_intent: Make invisible chemistry tangible — water becomes breathable oxygen.
scenes.information_role: Viewer understands light reactions release O₂ from water.

scenes.description: O₂ payoff card: large 'O₂' stat with subtitle 'Released into the air you breathe'. Cyan accent pop with subtle particle float in background.
scenes.movement: stat scale-up bounce; subtitle fade-in 0.3s delayed
scenes.overlay_notes: Remotion cut type: stat_card. stat='O₂', subtitle='Released into the air you breathe'. accentColor=#06B6D4.
scenes.shot_intent: Connect abstract reaction to the listener's body.
scenes.information_role: Viewer feels personal stake in the oxygen output.

scenes.description: Kinetic equation beat 2: CO₂ molecules (gray dots) flow from right into leaf silhouette; glucose hexagon assembles at center with pink (#EC4899) accent. Arrows show carbon fixation.
scenes.framing: leaf silhouette center, CO₂ enters from right edge
scenes.movement: CO2 stream particles → hexagon builds vertex-by-vertex; 'sugar' label snaps in on completion
scenes.overlay_notes: Label chip 'Plant fuel' appears when hexagon completes.
scenes.shot_intent: Show the second half of the equation — air becomes food.
scenes.information_role: Viewer sees CO₂ fixed into sugar inside the leaf.

scenes.description: Inputs recap card: three icon chips slide in sequentially — ☀ Sunlight, 💧 Water, 🌫 CO₂ — with labels. Builds anticipation for equation summary.
scenes.framing: horizontal icon row centered in middle third
scenes.movement: staggered slide-in left with 0.2s offset per chip
scenes.overlay_notes: text_card sequence; purple borders #7C3AED on each chip.
scenes.shot_intent: Prime the viewer for the in/out equation rhythm.
scenes.information_role: Viewer inventories the three inputs before the landing.

scenes.description: Equation landing hero: full equation '6CO₂ + 6H₂O + light → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂' with tagline 'Life's solar engine'. Split layout — inputs left (purple), outputs right (cyan). Mic-drop scale emphasis on final line.
scenes.framing: equation centered, tagline below in smaller weight
scenes.movement: equation draws in line-by-line; tagline fades up at 27s; gentle hold to 30s
scenes.overlay_notes: Remotion cut type: stat_card. stat='6CO₂ + 6H₂O + light → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂', subtitle='Life's solar engine'. Hero moment — max visual weight.
scenes.shot_intent: Deliver the aha — one equation, whole process.
scenes.information_role: Viewer leaves with the complete photosynthesis mental model.

metadata.feasibility_notes: All scenes render via Remotion native components + diagram_gen (Mermaid). No FLUX images required for standard path.
